system: fully parabolic-parabolic Keller-Segel: u_t=div(grad u - u grad v), v_t=Delta v + u - v
ic: u0=840 exp(-84 r^2), v0=420 exp(-42 r^2) (M_u=10*pi, supercritical)
scheme: positivity-preserving upwind FVM + central diffusion, explicit Euler, cfl=0.25
note: t_b is a resolution-gap proxy (resolution-dependent), NOT a continuum blow-up time
